# BOSS APEX client handoff summary template

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: BOSS and UH APEX Accelerator
Process type: Handoff summary
Primary geography: Houston area and UH APEX service area

## Purpose
Use this template to prepare a concise user-facing handoff summary for UH APEX, SBDC, SCORE, or SBA resource partners.

## Copy-ready handoff format
```text
User goal:
Business stage:
Business name:
Business address/city/county/ZIP:
For-profit status:
Legal formation status:
Industry:
Products or services:
Target government buyer or market:
Current registrations: EIN / UEI / CAGE / SAM / CMBL / certifications:
Past performance or commercial sales:
Current opportunity or deadline:
Main challenge:
Documents available:
Recommended resource:
Recommended next step:
Official link:
```

## BOSS use instructions
1. Keep the summary factual and short.
2. Do not include sensitive personal information unless the user chooses to provide it.
3. Separate known facts from assumptions.
4. Include the official source link for the route.
5. Add a guardrail if the user expects funding, certification, or contracts to be guaranteed.

## Retrieval tags
